parts.title: SKILL 6: USE COORDINATE CONNECTORS CORRECTLY
parts.instruction: When you have two clauses in an English sentence, you must connect the two clauses correctly. One way to connect two clauses is to use and, but, or, so, or yet between the clauses.

questions.question: The software should be used on a laptop computer, and this computer is a laptop.

reason.en: The sentence is grammatically correct because it uses the coordinate connector 'and' to join two independent clauses, each with its own subject and verb, preceded by a comma.
reason.id: Kalimat tersebut benar secara tata bahasa karena menggunakan kata hubung koordinatif 'and' untuk menggabungkan dua klausa independen, yang masing-masing memiliki subjek dan kata kerja sendiri, serta didahului oleh tanda koma.

reason.en: This option is incorrect because the sentence structure follows the rules for coordinate connectors correctly.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah karena struktur kalimat tersebut sudah mengikuti aturan penggunaan kata hubung koordinatif dengan benar.

parts.title: SKILL 7: USE ADVERB TIME AND CAUSE CONNECTORS CORRECTLY
parts.instruction: Sentences with adverb clauses have two basic patterns in English

questions.question: Since the bank closes in less than an hour, the deposits need to be tallied immediately.

reason.en: The sentence is grammatically correct. It uses the adverb time connector 'Since' at the beginning of the sentence, followed by a comma to separate the dependent clause ('Since the bank closes in less than an hour') from the independent clause ('the deposits need to be tallied immediately').
reason.id: Kalimat tersebut secara tata bahasa benar. Kalimat ini menggunakan konektor waktu 'Since' di awal kalimat, diikuti dengan koma untuk memisahkan klausa dependen ('Since the bank closes in less than an hour') dari klausa independen ('the deposits need to be tallied immediately').

reason.en: This option is incorrect because the sentence structure follows the rules for adverb time connectors perfectly.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah karena struktur kalimat sudah mengikuti aturan konektor waktu adverbia dengan sempurna.

questions.tested_skill: Section Two - Skills 6-8: Connect Multiple Clauses Correctly

sections.instruction: Many sentences in English have more than one clause. (A clause is a group of words containing a subject and a verb.) Whenever you find a sentence on the TOEFL test with more than one clause, you need to make sure that every subject has a verb and every verb has a subject. Next you need to check that the various clauses in the sentence are correctly joined. There are various ways to join clauses in English. Certain patterns appear frequently in English and on the TOEFL test. You should be very familiar with these patterns.

questions.question: The president of the United States appoints the cabinet members, ___appointments are subject to Senate approval.

reason.en: This option creates a comma splice, as it attempts to join two independent clauses without a coordinating conjunction.
reason.id: Opsi ini menciptakan comma splice, karena mencoba menggabungkan dua klausa independen tanpa kata hubung koordinatif.

reason.en: This option is grammatically incorrect because 'with their' creates a prepositional phrase that leaves the second clause without a subject-verb structure.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah secara tata bahasa karena 'with their' membentuk frasa preposisional yang membuat klausa kedua tidak memiliki struktur subjek-predikat.

reason.en: This option is incorrect because 'because' is an adverb connector that would require a different sentence structure to maintain logical flow and grammatical correctness.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah karena 'because' adalah kata hubung keterangan yang memerlukan struktur kalimat berbeda untuk menjaga alur logika dan kebenaran tata bahasa.

reason.en: This is the correct choice because 'but' is a coordinate connector used to join two independent clauses, correctly linking the two complete thoughts.
reason.id: Ini adalah pilihan yang benar karena 'but' adalah kata hubung koordinatif yang digunakan untuk menggabungkan dua klausa independen, menghubungkan dua pemikiran lengkap dengan tepat.
